channel.title: TDD on William Fang
channel.description: Recent content in TDD on William Fang

item.title: catch2: 测试框架
item.description: 安装 Demo 代码 /* * @Author: "william" * @Date: 2020-10-19 17:21:32 * @Last Modified by: "william" * @Last Modified time: 2020-10-19 17:29:18 */ #define CATCH_CONFIG_RUNNER #include "catch.hpp" int main( int argc, char *argv[]) { int res = Catch::Session().run( argc, argv); return res; // ========================================================================= // Catch::Session session; // There must be exactly one instance // int height = 0; // Some user variable you want to be able
